title: stelis discoidea
intro: Stelis discoidea is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its unique, small, and delicate appearance. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Stelis discoidea are said to include relief from pain, fever reduction, and the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
